tables.name: users
tables.description: Platform users including admins and agents. role field controls access level.

fields.name: role
fields.description: User role e.g. admin, agent, supervisor.

fields.name: is_active
fields.description: Whether the user account is active.

fields.name: contact_center_supervisor
fields.description: Whether the user is a contact center supervisor.

tables.name: companies
tables.description: Tenant/company accounts on the platform. Each company has a unique tenant_id.

fields.name: tenant_id
fields.description: Unique tenant identifier for this company.

fields.name: core.account_status
fields.description: Account status e.g. active, inactive, closed.

fields.name: core.account_closed_date
fields.description: Date the account was closed, if applicable.

fields.name: core.status_actor
fields.description: Who last changed the account status.

fields.name: core.status_changed_at
fields.description: When the account status last changed.

tables.name: campaigns
tables.description: Voicebot calling campaigns. Each campaign belongs to a tenant and has a status and active version.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Campaign status e.g. active, paused, completed, draft.

tables.name: campaign_configs
tables.description: Voicebot configuration for a campaign version. Contains call behaviour settings, retry logic, speech providers, and campaign field definitions.

fields.name: language
fields.description: Default language code e.g. en-IN, hi-IN.

fields.name: phone_number
fields.description: Caller ID phone number used for this campaign.

fields.name: call_timeout_seconds
fields.description: Seconds before a call attempt times out.

fields.name: speech_lm_provider
fields.description: LLM provider used for speech understanding.

fields.name: speech_lm_model
fields.description: LLM model name used for speech understanding.

fields.name: prompt_text
fields.description: Opening prompt text for the bot.

fields.name: campaign_fields
fields.description: Array of custom field definitions for this campaign. Each item has: name (string), type (string), direction (string), display_name (string), description (string).

tables.name: contacts
tables.description: Contact records uploaded for a campaign batch. Each contact has a mobile number and optional extended fields.

fields.name: batch_id
fields.description: Reference to batch_uploads.batch_id this contact belongs to.

fields.name: call_source
fields.description: Source of the call e.g. bulk_upload, api.

tables.name: batch_uploads
tables.description: Records of contact list uploads for a campaign. Each batch contains multiple contacts.

fields.name: contacts_count
fields.description: Number of contacts in this batch.

fields.name: excel_upload_url
fields.description: URL of the uploaded Excel file.

tables.name: campaign_queue
tables.description: Call queue entries for a campaign. Each entry represents one contact to be called, with retry tracking and current status.

fields.name: tenant_id
fields.description: Tenant this queue entry belongs to.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Queue entry status e.g. pending, in_progress, done, failed.

fields.name: priority
fields.description: Call priority. Higher value = higher priority.

fields.name: attempts
fields.description: Number of call attempts made so far.

fields.name: call_source
fields.description: Source of this queue entry e.g. bulk_upload, api.

fields.name: cancel_requested
fields.description: Whether cancellation has been requested for this entry.

fields.name: final_outcome
fields.description: Final outcome after all attempts e.g. answered, not_answered.

fields.name: next_attempt_at
fields.description: Scheduled time for next retry. Null if no retry scheduled.

fields.name: leased_at
fields.description: Timestamp when this entry was leased to a dialer.

tables.name: blacklist_contacts
tables.description: Mobile numbers that are blacklisted and must not be called.

tables.name: contact_center_agents
tables.description: Contact center agent configurations including SIP credentials and server URLs. Each agent is linked to a platform user.

fields.name: campaign_id
fields.description: Campaign this agent is assigned to (if any).

fields.name: display_name
fields.description: Agent display name shown in the UI.

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Whether this agent is currently enabled.

fields.name: asterisk_queue
fields.description: Asterisk queue name this agent is assigned to.

fields.name: contact_center_server_url
fields.description: HTTP URL of the contact center server.

fields.name: contact_center_ws_url
fields.description: WebSocket URL of the contact center server.

fields.name: manual_dialout_enabled
fields.description: Whether manual dial-out is enabled for this agent.

fields.name: manual_dialout_callerid
fields.description: Caller ID used for manual dial-out.

fields.name: manual_dialout_trunkid
fields.description: Trunk ID used for manual dial-out.

tables.name: call_history
tables.description: Full record of every call attempt made by the voicebot or contact center. Contains call outcome, duration, transcript, state history, agent disposition, and all extended bot-captured fields.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Contact name at time of call.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Overall call status e.g. completed, failed, no_answer.

fields.name: disposition
fields.description: Call disposition set by the bot.

fields.name: total_attempts
fields.description: Total number of call attempts made.

fields.name: call_source
fields.description: Source of the call e.g. bulk_upload, manual.

fields.name: call_summary
fields.description: AI-generated summary of the call recorded.

fields.name: transcript
fields.description: Full call transcript text. Null if unavailable.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Manual notes added to the call.

fields.name: recording_file
fields.description: Recording filename. Null if not recorded.

fields.name: recording_s3_key
fields.description: S3 key path for the recording file.

fields.name: trunk
fields.description: Telephony trunk used for the call.

fields.name: parent_call_id
fields.description: Parent call ID for transferred calls.

fields.name: call_hangup_actor
fields.description: Who hung up: bot, agent, or customer.

fields.name: fail_reason
fields.description: Reason for call failure. Null if successful.

fields.name: sip_status
fields.description: SIP response code. Null if not applicable.

fields.name: call_datetime
fields.description: Timestamp when the call was initiated.

fields.name: initiated_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the call was initiated.

fields.name: answered_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the call was answered. Null if not answered.

fields.name: agent_id
fields.description: ID of the agent who handled the call (if transferred).

fields.name: agent_name
fields.description: Name of the agent who handled the call.

fields.name: agent_call_duration
fields.description: Duration of the agent leg in seconds.

fields.name: agent_start_datetime
fields.description: Timestamp when the agent joined the call.

fields.name: agent_disposition.disposition
fields.description: Disposition label set by the agent.

fields.name: agent_disposition.custom_fields.callback_date_time
fields.description: Agent custom field: callback date and time.

fields.name: agent_disposition.custom_fields.promise_date
fields.description: Agent custom field: promise to pay date.

fields.name: screen_pop_context.step
fields.description: Bot step when screen pop was triggered.

fields.name: attempts
fields.description: Array of attempt objects. Each has: attempt_id (string), attempt_at (date), attempt_status (string), pre_call_status.status (string), pre_call_status.detail (string).

fields.name: channels
fields.description: Array of Asterisk channel objects. Each has: role (string), uniqueid (string).

fields.name: state_history
fields.description: Array of bot conversation state objects. Each has: state (string), recog_text (string — what the caller said), bot_prompt (string — what the bot said), language (string), intent (object with extracted intent fields).

fields.name: ext.contact_center_transfer
fields.description: Extended field: whether call was transferred to contact center.

fields.name: ext.contact_center_reason
fields.description: Extended field: reason for contact center transfer.

fields.name: ext.contact_center_summary
fields.description: Extended field: summary for contact center agent.

fields.name: ext.promise_to_pay_date
fields.description: Extended field: promise to pay date.

tables.name: scheduled_jobs
tables.description: Scheduled report jobs that run on a cron schedule and email results. Each job is tied to a campaign and tenant.

fields.name: cron_expression
fields.description: Cron expression defining the schedule e.g. 0 9 * * 1-5.

fields.name: timezone
fields.description: Timezone for the schedule e.g. Asia/Kolkata.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Job status e.g. active, paused, disabled.

fields.name: next_run_at
fields.description: Timestamp of the next scheduled execution.

fields.name: failure_email_to
fields.description: Array of email addresses to notify on failure.

fields.name: retry.enabled
fields.description: Whether retry on failure is enabled.

fields.name: config.email_to
fields.description: Array of recipient email addresses for the report.

fields.name: config.body_intro
fields.description: Introductory text in the email body.

fields.name: config.attach_xlsx
fields.description: Whether to attach an XLSX file to the email.

fields.name: config.max_rows
fields.description: Maximum rows to include in the report.

fields.name: config.date_range_rule
fields.description: Date range rule e.g. yesterday, last_7_days.

fields.name: config.columns
fields.description: Array of column names to include in the report.

fields.name: config.filters.campaign_id
fields.description: Campaign filter applied to the report.

fields.name: config.filters.direction
fields.description: Call direction filter e.g. inbound, outbound.

fields.name: created_by
fields.description: User ID who created the job.

fields.name: updated_by
fields.description: User ID who last updated the job.

tables.name: scheduled_job_runs
tables.description: Execution log for each scheduled job run. Records status, timing, errors, and results of each execution.

fields.name: job_type
fields.description: Type of job that was executed.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Run status e.g. success, failed, running.

fields.name: trigger_type
fields.description: What triggered this run e.g. scheduled, manual.

fields.name: attempt
fields.description: Attempt number for this run (1 = first attempt).

fields.name: error_code
fields.description: Error code if the run failed. Null on success.

fields.name: error_message
fields.description: Error message if the run failed. Null on success.

fields.name: scheduled_for
fields.description: The time this run was scheduled for.

fields.name: result.email_sent
fields.description: Whether the report email was sent successfully.

fields.name: result.row_count
fields.description: Number of data rows in the report.

fields.name: result.email_message_id
fields.description: Email message ID from the mail server. Null if not sent.

fields.name: result.template_code
fields.description: Template code used for this run.

fields.name: input_snapshot.email_to
fields.description: Recipient emails used for this run.

fields.name: input_snapshot.email_cc
fields.description: CC emails used for this run.

fields.name: input_snapshot.max_rows
fields.description: Max rows setting used for this run.

fields.name: input_snapshot.trigger_type
fields.description: Trigger type recorded at run time.

fields.name: input_snapshot.filters.campaign_id
fields.description: Campaign filter used for this run.

fields.name: input_snapshot.filters.direction
fields.description: Direction filter used for this run.

relationships.description: Contact belongs to a campaign. Use $lookup with localField: campaign_id, foreignField: _id, from: campaigns.
Contact belongs to a batch upload. Use $lookup with localField: batch_id, foreignField: batch_id, from: batch_uploads.
Queue entry belongs to a campaign. Use $lookup with localField: campaign_id, foreignField: _id, from: campaigns.
Queue entry references a contact. Use $lookup with localField: contact_id, foreignField: _id, from: contacts.
Config belongs to a campaign. Use $lookup with localField: campaign_id, foreignField: _id, from: campaigns.
Call record belongs to a campaign. Use $lookup with localField: campaign_id, foreignField: _id, from: campaigns.
Call record references a contact. Use $lookup with localField: contact_id, foreignField: _id, from: contacts.
Batch upload belongs to a campaign. Use $lookup with localField: campaign_id, foreignField: _id, from: campaigns.
Agent is linked to a user. Use $lookup with localField: user_id, foreignField: _id, from: users.
Scheduled job belongs to a campaign. Use $lookup with localField: campaign_id, foreignField: _id, from: campaigns.
Run record belongs to a scheduled job. Use $lookup with localField: scheduled_job_id, foreignField: _id, from: scheduled_jobs.
Run record belongs to a campaign. Use $lookup with localField: campaign_id, foreignField: _id, from: campaigns.
Company is linked to users via tenant_id.
Campaign belongs to a company via tenant_id.
